text: Stepping into this modern, brightly lit space, I am overcome by a sense of curiosity and reflection. The environment is intentionally crafted and intellectual, inviting me to ponder the dialogue between humanity and technology. As I approach the 'R+D' exhibit, the questions about research, development, and our evolving relationship with intelligent machines ignite both excitement and a gentle unease about the future we are constantly shaping—one innovation, one idea at a time.
